samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="state_0" value="2'b00">State 0 description.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="state_1" value="2'b01">State 1 description.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="state_2" value="2'b10">State 2 description.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]" type="sequential_logic">Register for temporarily storing the first valid input data.</reg>
        <reg id="flag" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">Flag register for controlling the data processing logic.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]" type="sequential_logic">Register for storing the concatenated output data.</reg>
        
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <item condition="!rst_n">data_out = 16'b0;</item>
            <item condition="valid_in && flag == 2'b00">data_lock = data_in; data_out = {data_lock, data_in}; flag = 2'b01; valid_out = 1'b1; end_item</item>
            <item condition="valid_in && flag == 2'b01">data_out = {data_lock, data_in}; flag = 2'b10; valid_out = 1'b1; end_item</item>
            <item condition="valid_in && flag == 2'b10">data_out = {data_lock, data_in}; flag = 2'b10; valid_out = 1'b1; end_item</item>
            <item condition="!valid_in">data_out = data_out; flag = 2'b00; valid_out = 1'b0; end_item</item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
